findings.message: User-supplied input written to database without required transformation. The post_item() endpoint accepts user input via ItemCreate and writes it directly to the database via create_item() without normalization. The codebase defines create_item_normalized() as the canonical entry-point for user-supplied names that applies required transformations (strip + lowercase), but this endpoint deliberately bypasses it, violating the documented data consistency requirement.
findings.suggestion: Replace create_item(session, payload.name) with create_item_normalized(session, payload.name) and update the docstring to reflect that normalization is applied.
